en_title: EU Says It's Powerless to Stop PlayStation From Killing Discs: 'Companies Are Free to Offer Games and Services in the Manner They See Fit'
cn_title: 欧盟称无权阻止索尼放弃PlayStation游戏光盘
subtitle: 选择权在企业
opus_summary: 索尼计划自2028年起停止为新PS5游戏发行实体版。欧盟表示，只要企业遵守消费者保护法律，便有权决定游戏和服务的提供方式，无法出面阻止。

paragraphs.en: As gamers sign online petitions and swarm upon each and every PlayStation social media post, the EU has said it’s powerless to actually stop Sony — and indeed any company — from killing discs.
paragraphs.cn: 玩家们一边签署在线请愿，一边涌入PlayStation的每条社交媒体动态表达不满，但欧盟表示，它实际上无权阻止索尼乃至任何公司淘汰游戏光盘。

paragraphs.en: Sony's controversial decision to stop releasing games on physical discs has sparked a backlash from gamers upset at the move to an all-digital future for all new PS5 games launched from January 2028 onwards — something that's almost certain to also continue on PS6 . A high-profile petition calling on Sony to reconsider its decision is inching towards 300,000 signatures, and in the past few days, PS5 users have taken to social media to share screenshots of cancelled PS Plus subscriptions.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼决定停止发行实体游戏光盘，此举引发争议。自2028年1月起推出的所有新PS5游戏都将迈向纯数字化，而这一做法几乎肯定也会延续至PS6，令玩家强烈不满。一项呼吁索尼重新考虑决定的知名请愿已接近30万人签名；过去几天里，PS5用户还在社交媒体上分享取消PS Plus订阅的截图。

paragraphs.en: Some had hoped that the EU, which has a record of strict consumer protection, might aid the cause, but Ireland’s EU Commissioner has said Sony cannot be stopped from doing away with physical discs.
paragraphs.cn: 有人原本希望以严格保护消费者权益著称的欧盟能助其一臂之力，但爱尔兰籍欧盟委员表示，无法阻止索尼放弃实体光盘。

paragraphs.en: As reported by the Irish Mirror , European Commissioner for consumer protection, Michael McGrath, said the EU is unable to step in. "It does come down to commercial and contractual freedoms, and companies are free to offer games and services in the manner that they see fit, provided that consumer rights are fully protected in line with national and EU law,” he said.
paragraphs.cn: 据《Irish Mirror》报道，欧盟消费者保护专员迈克尔·McGrath表示，欧盟无法介入。他说：「归根结底，这涉及商业自由和合同自由。只要消费者权利按照各国及欧盟法律得到充分保护，企业便可自行决定以何种方式提供游戏和服务。」

paragraphs.en: "At this time, we did have to consider a European citizens initiative on this question of whether games should continue to be available after a new edition of the game has been brought forward."
paragraphs.cn: 「目前，我们确实必须审议一项欧洲公民倡议，所涉及的问题是：在游戏推出新版之后，旧版是否应继续保持可用。」

paragraphs.en: Part of the backlash around Sony’s decision to kill discs has to do with ownership and preservation. Last month, the Stop Killing Games campaign suffered a setback when the European Commission said it was unable to propose a legal obligation to keep video games playable after they stop being provided commercially due to existing intellectual property rights. Under EU copyright law, the Commission said, rights holders enjoy exclusive rights over their creations.
paragraphs.cn: 围绕索尼淘汰光盘决定的部分反对声，与所有权及游戏保存问题有关。上个月，「Stop Killing Games」行动遭遇挫折：欧盟委员会表示，受现行知识产权制度所限，它无法提出法律义务，要求电子游戏在停止商业供应后仍须保持可玩。委员会称，按照欧盟版权法，权利人对其创作享有专有权。

paragraphs.en: With the EU out of the picture, will the online backlash be enough to force Sony into a U-turn? Not a chance, analysts have told IGN . Dr. Serkan Toto, CEO of Japanese game industry consultancy firm Kantan Games, suggested that even if half a million people cancelled their PlayStation Plus subscription in protest, it would be just a drop in the ocean for Sony — which is not going to change its mind.
paragraphs.cn: 既然欧盟不会介入，网络上的反对声能否迫使索尼收回决定？分析师告诉IGN，绝无可能。日本游戏行业咨询公司Kantan Games首席执行官Serkan Toto博士认为，即便有50万人以取消PlayStation Plus订阅抗议，对索尼而言也只是沧海一粟，索尼不会改变主意。

paragraphs.en: "I sympathize with physical media fans, but Sony will not reverse this decision," Toto told IGN. "They of course knew what the online reaction would look like, and they now wait for this storm to pass.
paragraphs.cn: Toto告诉IGN：「我同情实体媒介爱好者，但索尼不会撤销这项决定。他们当然早已知道网络反应会是什么样子，现在只是在等这场风波过去。」

paragraphs.en: "Sony has over 120 million active PlayStation users," he continued. "Around 50 million people subscribe to PlayStation Plus. As a thought experiment, let's say 500,000 cancel in protest, that would be just 1% of that business gone — of course not enough to Sony to start rethinking. Digital is just too lucrative."
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「索尼拥有超过1.2亿名PlayStation活跃用户，约有5,000万人订阅PlayStation Plus。假设有50万人为抗议而退订，那也只相当于这项业务流失1%，当然不足以让索尼重新考虑。数字业务实在太赚钱了。」

paragraphs.en: For Sony, going all-digital for new game releases will earn it more money from every sale at a time when console sales are expected to plummet due to their rising cost. For a first-party PlayStation game such as The Last of Us, Sony will only keep around 65% of the money from a physical copy, with around 30% going to the retailer and roughly another 5% on manufacturing costs. Meanwhile, for a physical copy of a third-party game such as the Activision-published Call of Duty, Sony will get a licensing fee, likely around 15%.
paragraphs.cn: 随着主机成本上涨、销量预计大幅下滑，新游戏全面数字化能让索尼从每笔销售中赚到更多。以《最后生还者》这样的PlayStation第一方游戏为例，实体版收入中索尼只能留下约65%，约30%归零售商，另有约5%用于生产。至于动视发行的《使命召唤》等第三方游戏实体版，索尼获得的授权费可能约为15%。

paragraphs.en: For downloads, however, the margins are much higher. For a first-party game sold via Sony's own PlayStation Store, the company obviously keeps 100% of the revenue. For third-party games such as Call of Duty, meanwhile, Sony keeps a 30% cut (so, roughly $21 for a $70 game).
paragraphs.cn: 数字下载的利润率则高得多。第一方游戏通过索尼自有的PlayStation Store销售时，公司显然能保留100%的收入；对于《使命召唤》等第三方游戏，索尼可抽成30%，也就是一款70美元(约合人民币475元)的游戏能为其带来约21美元(约合人民币143元)。

paragraphs.en: Overnight, Santa Monica Studio confirmed that God of War Laufey will "be available on disc," suggesting its launch will arrive in 2027. Insomniac has also confirmed Marvel’s Wolverine will be released on-disc.
paragraphs.cn: 昨夜，圣莫妮卡工作室确认《战神：Laufey》将「提供实体光盘版」，这暗示游戏会在2027年发售。Insomniac也已确认《漫威金刚狼》将推出实体版。

pending_dict.note: 未确认正式中文名，保留英文
